working_on: Routine task P5-12: Phase 5 closeout (engine/build_readiness/phase_5_closeout.md + ENGINE_LOG + STATE.md + optional close ADR) — sixteenth and final routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; closes the last of 16 explicit Phase 5 tasks per ADR 0052 decomposition. Eligible for the first time at S-0075 close (P5-11 cross-bridges complete; P5-12 depends_on [P5-11] now satisfied). P5-12 ships engine/build_readiness/phase_5_closeout.md per phase_5.md T1-F + Success criteria section: per-subdomain coverage (380 nodes / 536 edges across 15 seed migrations); soft-warn telemetry trends across S-0050 → S-0075 (missing_rigor_score 25 → 366 monotonic; issue_collision low background; health_check_overdue persistent late); predicate registry final state (cross_domain_dependency NOT promoted, row removed at S-0075 per T1-E/T3-B); Tier 1/2/3 forward-pointer disposition; per-task closure summary; no Phase-5-wide ADR (decomposition executed cleanly, no supersession warranted). After P5-12 lands, T-PHASE-5 is target-met (next routine fire exits at step 3).
declared_scope: Author engine/build_readiness/phase_5_closeout.md as a first-of-its-kind closeout report for the project. Shape derives from phase_5.md 'Success criteria' section (lines 298-306). Sections: (1) Per-subdomain coverage — table of node/edge counts per subdomain extracted from migration contract headers (totals: 380 nodes / 536 edges); per-subdomain confidence_level composition observations where derivable; granularity-principle observations on subdomains that produced denser/sparser concept sets than expected; (2) Soft-warn telemetry trends across S-0050 → S-0075 — per-category trend table; the dominant signal is missing_rigor_score growing monotonically from 25 (S-0050) to 366 (S-0075) per the choice not to backfill rigor scores at seed time (carries forward to Phase 6 self-correction); secondary persistent: issue_collision (consistent low background); health_check_overdue (fired late at S-0063 and S-0075); zero hard-fails across all 16 routine sessions; (3) Predicate registry final state — record the S-0075 T1-E/T3-B adjudication (cross_domain_dependency NOT promoted, reserved-but-unused row removed in same commit); active registry remains the v1 two-predicate set (pedagogical_prerequisite covering both within-domain and cross-domain; historical_influence reserved-but-unused awaiting Phase 6); (4) Tier 1/2/3 forward-pointer disposition — walk through phase_5.md's 7 T1 + 8 T2 + 7 T3 entries; record which were honored as authored, which evolved during execution; (5) Per-task closure summary — the 16 tasks plus the resumption pattern at S-0050 (P5-01a closed_partial → completed at S-0053 boot rollover) and S-0063 (P5-06 closed_partial → completed at S-0068); (6) Mechanism exercise summary — apply_migration.py wrapper (S-0066, S-0068, S-0070, S-0071, S-0073, S-0074, S-0075 — seven exercises including S-0073's exit-3 SQL-error rollback path); routine_lifecycle_push.py wrapper (S-0061+); routine_boot_freshness.py (S-0072+); (7) Cadence-overdue audit-defer — record that S-0076 boot surfaced health_check_overdue (slots_since=11 vs cadence=10; overdue by 1; last_audit=S-0065); STATE.md framed S-0076 as 'natural surface for the project health-check audit' because closeout is itself audit-shaped; the audit-shaped *content* relevant to Phase 5 (per-subdomain coverage trends, soft-warn telemetry trends, predicate registry final state) is folded into this closeout deliverable; the *formal* project-wide health audit acceptance (author docs/health-checks/S-NNNN.md, run scan_orphans.py, bump last_audit_session) requires the discretionary 'Run audit now or defer' judgment and is properly an interactive /start-engine action; routine-mode cannot adjudicate; trigger continues firing until the next interactive session lands the formal audit. No supersession ADR — Phase 5 surfaced no finding warranting ADR 0052 supersession (decomposition executed cleanly, epistemology-first calibration held, pre-split/single-task discipline produced session-sized work, cross-bridges-runs-last contained cross-domain edge collisions, service nodes pass produced clean primitives, out-of-scope deferrals — philosophy of religion, history-as-subdomain — remain admissible per the class-boundary clause but were not pressed by Phase 5 execution). One small Issue filing planned: 'engine/build_readiness/README.md should index closeout-class reports separately from gate-class reports' (build_readiness/README.md is NOT in P5-12 scope_lock, so the README index update is properly deferred). End-state: P5-12 marked complete in auto_target.json; check_target.py shows all 16 tasks PASS; T-PHASE-5 fully closed; auto_target.json target-met; phase: P_5

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope was the seven-section first-of-its-kind closeout report (per-subdomain coverage; soft-warn telemetry trends; predicate registry final state; Tier 1/2/3 forward-pointer disposition; per-task closure summary; mechanism exercise summary; cadence-overdue audit-defer note) plus optional close ADR (rejected after consideration); delivered exactly that shape with a 'Phase 5 at a glance' executive summary up front, an explicit 'No close ADR' rationale section, and a 'Forward pointers to Phase 6+' section. Three task criteria all PASS at S-0076 close (adr_status 0052 product Accepted; file_exists engine/build_readiness/phase_5_closeout.md; validate_passes 0 hard-fails). One in-band Issue filed (#26 — build_readiness/README.md should index closeout-class reports separately; out-of-scope for P5-12 scope_lock and properly deferred to next interactive session). No HANDOFF entries (no genuine blockers, scope-expansion-needed, or decision-required signals). Cadence-overdue posture (audit-defer) recorded explicitly in closeout + commit + this scope_delivery. routine_boot_freshness silent no-op as expected (worktree at origin/main HEAD post-S-0075). routine_lifecycle_push wrapper used for both eager-claim and deliverable pushes; both succeeded on first attempt with parent main FF. Two-commit pattern continued (eager-claim e3a261f + deliverable 072e92a + this close). Eighth load-bearing routine-mode exercise of routine_lifecycle_push wrapper completed cleanly. Note: S-0076 is the FIRST routine session whose work was not a SQL migration (the apply_migration.py wrapper was not exercised this session); the closeout deliverable is documentation-only. All other routine-mode mechanisms exercised normally.

issues_filed.title: build_readiness/README.md should index closeout-class reports separately from gate-class reports

side_discoveries.reasoning: The 'deferred-to-Phase-6 surface' phrase in the deliverable commit message references the rigor_score calibration deferral pre-decided at phase_5.md T3-C (master plan, S-0045). The closeout's 'Forward pointers to Phase 6+' section documents the deferral explicitly with a pointer to product/docs/self-correction.md as the Phase 6 surface. This is the standard pre-decided phase-spanning deferral being properly recorded at phase close, not a new session-internal discovery.

commits.summary: Phase 5 seed graph build closeout — P5-12 complete; T-PHASE-5 fully closed

outcome_summary: Phase 5 closes. P5-12 complete; T-PHASE-5 target-met (16/16 tasks). Authored engine/build_readiness/phase_5_closeout.md — first-of-its-kind closeout artifact (existing build_readiness/*.md are gate reports per ADR 0040; this is a closeout per ADR 0051). Seven sections: per-subdomain coverage table (380 nodes / 536 edges across 15 seed migrations); soft-warn telemetry trends across S-0050 → S-0075 (missing_rigor_score 25 → 366 monotonic, deferred-to-Phase-6 surface; issue_collision low background; health_check_overdue persistent late); predicate registry final state (cross_domain_dependency NOT promoted at S-0075 per T1-E/T3-B); Tier 1/2/3 disposition (all 7 T1 held; all 8 T2 held; T3-B closed; T3-C/T3-D/T3-E/T3-G carry to Phase 6+); per-task closure summary with partial-resumption pattern; mechanism exercise summary; cadence-overdue audit-defer note. No close ADR (no finding warrants ADR 0052 supersession; cross_domain_dependency decision properly recorded in PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md). Filed Issue #26 (build_readiness/README.md should index closeout-class reports separately — out-of-scope for P5-12 scope_lock). 0 HANDOFF entries. validate.py: 30 checks, 0 hard-fails, 374 soft-warns (366 missing_rigor_score continuing the partial-seed pattern; 7 issue_collision unchanged; 1 health_check_overdue — formal cadence audit defer to next interactive S-0077). Two-commit pattern (eager-claim e3a261f + deliverable 072e92a + this close). routine_boot_freshness silent no-op as expected; routine_lifecycle_push wrapper used for both eager-claim and deliverable pushes. Eighth load-bearing routine-mode exercise of routine_lifecycle_push wrapper completed cleanly. **First routine session whose work was not a SQL migration**: closeout deliverable is documentation-only; apply_migration.py wrapper not exercised this session. Phase 5 final stats: 16 routine sessions consumed of 18 max_sessions (2-session buffer preserved); 2 closed_partial sessions (S-0050, S-0063) both resumed cleanly; 4 in-band Issues across the phase (#9, #14, #18, #19) all closed at prior interactive sessions. Phases 0-5 all closed. Forward state: next routine fire exits at step 3 ('target met for T-PHASE-5, no claim'); next interactive /start-engine session lands cadence audit + Phase 6 master plan.
